quicksight.datasource.datasourcecredenti: Data source credentials. This is a variant type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be non-null.

quicksight.datasource.datasourcecredenti.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a data source that has the credential pair that you want to use. When `CopySourceArn` is not null, the credential pair from the data source in the ARN is used as the credentials for the `DataSourceCredentials` structure.
Credential pair. For more information, see ` [CredentialPair](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/APIReference/API_CredentialPair.html) `.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the secret associated with the data source in AWS Secrets Manager.
